content: BLOCKER: fal.ai balance exhausted (user action — non-blocking for Phase 2 code)
Phase 2.1: Auth (register, login, /me, dev-bypass) + JWT middleware + password hashing
Phase 2.3: Closet service (CRUD with Source Tags enforcement + best-effort fal segmentation + variant edit endpoint)
Phase 2.4: Listings service (CRUD + fee preview + source transition Private→Shared/Retail)
Phase 2.5: Transactions service (create pending with financial ledger)
Phase 2.6: Stylist memory persistence + closet_summary hydration
Phase 2.8: Smoke test green; now hand off to testing_agent_v3 for comprehensive Phase 2 validation
Phase 3: React frontend (closet, camera, stylist chat with streaming audio, marketplace, admin)
Phase 4: Stripe Connect Express + Google Calendar OAuth + Trend-Scout background agent
Phase 5: Admin dashboard + polish + comprehensive E2E testing
